name: anyslate-codex
description: Connect Codex to AnySlate AI Memory through MCP with automatic recall, checkpoint, and artifact workflow guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Use AnySlate AI Memory automatically from Codex
interface.longDescription: AnySlate for Codex connects the AnySlate MCP bridge and adds Codex-specific workflow rules so Codex can recall prior work, checkpoint decisions, persist artifacts, and continue tasks across sessions without mixing AI Memory with ordinary Markdown file tools.
defaultPrompt: Recall AnySlate context for this repo and continue the work.
Checkpoint this implementation plan into AnySlate.
Find prior decisions related to this task.
